no_teams_desc: Create a team or adjust the search keyword to see results here.
no_filtered_teams_desc: Try another keyword or switch back to active teams.
create_team_desc: Create a team as a system admin, choose the initial team admin, and bind exactly one storage policy group.
team_details_desc: Review the team overview, storage usage, and update the name, description, and policy group binding.
team_search_placeholder: Search by team name or description...
team_admin_identifier_desc: Use an existing active user's username or email address. That user becomes the initial team admin.
team_policy_group_desc: Every team must keep exactly one active policy group. Only system admins can change it.
team_quota_create_desc: Leave blank to use the system default quota. Enter 0 for unlimited.
team_quota_update_desc: Leave blank or enter 0 for unlimited.
archive_team_desc: The team will be archived and disappear from active workspaces.
team_member_search_placeholder: Search members by username, email, or ID...
team_member_filtered_empty_desc: Try another keyword or adjust the filters.
team_members_readonly_archived: Archived teams stay readable, but member changes are disabled.
team_audit_desc: Track profile changes, membership updates, and archive or restore activity for this team.
team_audit_empty_desc: Team management events will appear here in reverse chronological order.
team_danger_zone_desc: Keep high-risk operations here so the impact stays obvious before execution.
team_danger_zone_hint: Confirm another manager is still available and notify members before archiving the team.
team_restore_danger_desc: Restoring the team makes it visible in active workspaces again and re-enables member access.
team_archive_confirm_label: Type the team name to confirm archiving
team_details_footer_hint: Changes are applied to the system immediately, including archive and restore actions.
